idea-plugin.name: Ansible Companion
idea-plugin.description:
Encrypt and decrypt Ansible Vault (1.1/AES256 format) directly in the editor, without leaving the IDE and without depending on ansible-vault being installed (reimplemented with javax.crypto, verified against the official Ansible test suite).

Select plain text -> Encrypt Selection as Ansible Vault, or a $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256 block -> Decrypt Ansible Vault Selection. Both available from the editor's context menu. The password is never saved or cached.

FQCN-aware completion and role support are coming in a future release.

action.description: Encrypts the selected text as an Ansible Vault 1.1/AES256 block
Decrypts a selected Ansible Vault 1.1/AES256 block
